steps.subject: Still looking, {{first_name}}?
steps.body_html:
Caught Your Eye?

Hi {{first_name}},

We noticed you were checking out some of our products. Still interested? Here's a quick link back to pick up where you left off.

Continue Browsing
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, still interested in what you were browsing? Continue shopping at {{site_url}}.

steps.subject: These might be just what you're looking for
steps.preview_text: Curated picks based on your browsing.
steps.body_html:
Picked for You

Hi {{first_name}},

Based on what you were browsing, we think you might like these popular picks from our collection.

Explore Our Bestsellers

Happy shopping!
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, based on your browsing, check out our bestsellers at {{site_url}}.
